heading: Application of Convention
label: 80502 Application of Convention
text: The Convention applies to an owner of a container used in international transport if the owner is domiciled or has its principal office in the United States.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)8050246 App.:1502(a) (related to application of Convention).(related to application of Convention), , .Pub. L. 95–208, § 3(a)91 Stat. 1476Dec. 13, 1977This section restates the applicability criteria of 46 App.:1502(a)(1) and (2) to improve the organization of the chapter.
